---
title: "About Me"
---

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="40%"}
![](images/dogpic.jpg)
:::

::: {.column width="60%"}
## Yixuan Yang

Startup Entrepreneur | 3D Artist | Project Manager | Multimedia Specialist | Data Analyst

I am a former owner of a business that hosted in-person Murder Mystery Games, an animator who worked on the game *Yolked* at Hard Boiled Studio, and a current MS student in Global Marketing Management at Boston University.

I hold a BS degree in Animation from Drexel University, and I have a passion for creating engaging and immersive experiences for different audiences using a variety of skills and tools, such as Marketing Technology, 3D creation tools, and data analysis.

I am motivated by the challenge and opportunity to create innovative and captivating products and projects that can reach and delight a global audience.
:::
::::

## Education

- **MS, Global Marketing Management** — Boston University *(in progress)*
- **BS, Animation** — Drexel University

## Skills

| Category | Tools & Technologies |
|---|---|
| Programming | Python, JavaScript, R |
| Backend / Automation | FastAPI, n8n, Railway, Node.js |
| Data Analysis | Pandas, ggplot2, ML (sklearn) |
| 3D & Creative | Blender, Maya, After Effects |
| Marketing Tech | HubSpot, Quarto, SEO |
